rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2º Die Novri 1814
rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` as its description '2º Die Novri' is a more accurate visual reading than `gpt-5-mini`'s '2do De Novr'. Both correctly identified as a header with no amounts.
Selected `gemini-flash` for its more accurate description 'revolutum' matching the image, compared to `gpt-5-mini`'s 'diem revolution'. Both correctly identified as a header with no amounts.
Selected `gemini-flash` for its more accurate description without the trailing dash seen in `gpt-5-mini`. Both correctly identified as a header with no amounts.

Combined readings: 'Rents' from `gpt-5-mini` is more accurate than 'Rects' from `gemini-flash`, and `gemini-flash`'s period is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s dash. Both correctly identified as a header with no amounts.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s description and monetary values. The description is a clear visual match. The amounts are clearly 135 pounds, with dashes indicating zero shillings and pence, which `gemini-flash` correctly interpreted. `gpt-5-mini`'s description was inaccurate and it missed the zero shillings/pence.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s description and monetary values. The description is a clear visual match. The amounts are clearly 136 pounds, with dashes indicating zero shillings and pence, which `gemini-flash` correctly interpreted. `gpt-5-mini`'s description was inaccurate and it missed the zero shillings/pence.

Overrode extractor classifications. Visual inspection confirms 'Little Tew' acts as an indented header/sub-category label with no associated monetary value. `gemini-flash` marked it as an 'entry' and `gpt-5-mini` had a wrong description ('Able New') for this line. My selection uses the correct description and row type.

Selected `gemini-flash`'s description and complete monetary interpretation (0.10.0). The description is a clear visual match. `gpt-5-mini` misread the description ('Banwoke') and had incomplete amount fields.
Full consensus between extractors on description, row type, and absence of amounts.

Selected `gpt-5-mini`'s interpretation of 'Kidlington Rectory' as a header with no associated amounts, which visually matches the ledger. `gemini-flash` incorrectly assigned the amount from the subsequent line to this row and classified it as an entry.

Overrode both extractors. `gemini-flash` correctly read the description but incorrectly stated no amounts for this line. `gpt-5-mini` misread the description as 'Vicarage' but correctly extracted the amounts as 4 pounds and 19 shillings (with a dash indicating 0 pence). My reading combines the correct description with the correct amount interpretation.
Full consensus between extractors on description, row type, and absence of amounts. `gemini-flash` correctly noted 'Fixed' as faint, which is visually accurate.

Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct pounds amount (17, visually clearer than `gpt-5-mini`'s 171) and more accurate description ('P.T.J.' vs 'P.T.D'). Both correctly identified 11 shillings and 0 pence.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Hills' is clearer than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mills'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description as it accurately reflects the text without additional punctuation (as seen in `gpt-5-mini`). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Clifton' is clearly visible compared to `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Ufton'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Bensington' is clearer than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Bessington'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Trehkenin' is a closer visual match than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Frothewin'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.

Overrode extractor classifications. Visual inspection confirms this second instance of 'Little Tew' acts as an indented header/sub-category label with no associated monetary value. `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified this as a header (row 19), while `gemini-flash` (row 19) incorrectly combined it with the 'Taylor' entry.

Selected `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Taylor 3 Years') as it is more precise for this specific entry under the 'Little Tew' header. `gemini-flash` combined 'Taylor' with the parent 'Little Tew' in its description. Amounts are in full consensus and visually verified as correct.

Selected `gemini-flash` for correct description ('Phage' is a clear visual match compared to `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Judge') and correct pounds amount (18 vs `gpt-5-mini`'s 13). Shillings and pence were consistent between extractors.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Gibbons' is a clearer visual match than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Habons'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Full consensus between extractors on description, amounts, and row type.
Full consensus between extractors on description, amounts, and row type.
Selected `gpt-5-mini` for the correct pence whole amount (visually 1, not `gemini-flash`'s 11). Description, pounds, shillings, and pence fraction were otherwise in consensus and visually verified.

Overrode extractor classifications. Visual inspection confirms 'Lad Lane' acts as an indented header/sub-category label with no associated monetary value. `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified this as a header (row 26), while `gemini-flash` (row 25) incorrectly combined it with the 'Comyns' entry.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Comyns' is a clearer visual match than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Conyers'). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Do Wilson' is a clearer visual match). `gpt-5-mini` omitted 'Do'. Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Do Pickford' is a clearer visual match). `gpt-5-mini` omitted 'Do'. Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Full consensus between extractors on description, amounts, and row type.

Overrode `gpt-5-mini`'s structure. The description 'Recepta Anni presentis' is clearly associated with the total amount 613.19.1 on the same line. `gemini-flash` correctly captured this as a single 'total' row with its description. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly split this into two rows, one with an empty description and one with the description but no amount.

Overrode `gpt-5-mini`'s structure. Visual inspection confirms 'Received of Bankers' is a distinct header row without amounts, preceding the individual dividend entries. `gemini-flash` correctly identified this as a header. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly combined this with the first dividend entry's description.

Selected `gemini-flash` for the correct pounds amount (19, visually clearer than `gpt-5-mini`'s 9) and accurate description. `gpt-5-mini`'s description also incorrectly included the 'Received of Bankers' header. Shillings and pence were consistent.
Selected `gemini-flash`'s description ('Do Do' is a clearer visual match without the dash present in `gpt-5-mini`). Amounts were in full consensus and visually verified as correct.
Full consensus between extractors on description (empty), amounts, and row type. Visually verified as correct.
